prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约9633→9389→9199→7171→11263，2024年大幅前移至7171名，但2025年因考试模式改革（文理分科改为3+1+2）及专业组划分，最低位次回落至11263名，近5年整体波动较大，2025年基准约11263名；本省理科/物理类计划2021-2025年分别为114→112→110→104→105人，2026年计划104人，较2025年微降1人，属小幅缩招，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜约第38名（东北大学），近年排名稳定，层次较高；东北大学（主校）2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，抖音热度一般（总排名第82），未见明显投档断档记录，整体舆情平稳；依托东北大学学科体系，控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-、软件工程A-，与该校计算机类、自动化类、电子信息类、机械类等招生专业高度关联，对理科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势专业方向吻合；本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人，竞争略有缓解；该校位于河北秦皇岛，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划微降1人（小幅缩招）、考生总数减少约6000人（竞争缓解）及优势学科吸引力，在2025年基准11263名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约11149名，区间10649-11649名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 9633 → 9389 → 9199 → 7171 → 11263. In 2024, it significantly advanced to 7171, but in 2025, due to the exam mode reform (changing from arts/science division to 3+1+2) and major group division, the minimum ranking fell back to 11263. Overall, there has been considerable fluctuation over the past 5 years, with the 2025 baseline around 11263. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 114 → 112 → 110 → 104 → 105 students respectively, and the 2026 plan is 104 students, a slight decrease of 1 student from 2025, indicating a minor enrollment reduction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 38th on the Soft Science main list (Northeastern University), with stable rankings in recent years and a high level. Northeastern University (main campus) has a neutral/mixed reputation evaluation in 2026, with average Douyin popularity (82nd overall), no significant record of admission gaps, and overall stable public opinion. Relying on the discipline system of Northeastern University, it has A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Metallurgical Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Materials Science and Engineering, and A- in Software Engineering, which are highly related to the university's enrollment majors such as Computer Class, Automation Class, Electronic Information Class, and Mechanical Class, exerting strong appeal to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the province has 167,419 physics category examinees, a decrease of about 5,928 from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Qinhuangdao, Hebei, not a local university in the province, so there is no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, a slight decrease of 1 student in the 2026 plan (minor enrollment reduction), a decrease of about 6,000 examinees (easing competition), and the appeal of advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 11,263. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11,149, with a range of 10,649 to 11,649.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Automation Class (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Intelligent Perception Engineering
- Mechanical Class (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Instrument Class (Intelligent Optoelectronic Perception)
- Mathematics Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (including Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc.)
- Economics Class (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Business Administration Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- E-commerce.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10,649-11,649, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10,600), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Automation Class and Computer Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 11,500), it is recommended to take Tier 2 as the core and Tier 3 as a safe backup.
